name: Lolly
tagline: The sweetest thing you'll ever unwrap.

name: Mango
tagline: Warmth meets air-pulse. The hug your body's been waiting for.

name: Melon
tagline: Big energy. Small footprint. Warm vibes.

name: Peach
tagline: No buttons. No app. Just squeeze.

name: Pixie
tagline: Tiny but mighty.

name: Plum
tagline: For every day of your cycle. Yes, those days too.
Cannot be found. Does not know where it is. Vibes anyway.

name: AI
tagline: Trained on every emotion. Still can't text back normally.

name: Anxious
tagline: Already worried about tomorrow. And Tuesday. And 2031.

name: Astro
tagline: Just wants to understand TikTok. Probes are purely medical.

name: Avo
tagline: Calm and grounding.

name: Axolotl
tagline: Permanently smiling. Nobody knows how. An icon.

name: Bandaid
tagline: Can't solve everything but will try. Covers your wounds.

name: Bat
tagline: Sees the world differently. Literally hangs upside down.

name: Battery
tagline: Fully charged on Monday. Dead by Wednesday. We've all been there.

name: Berri
tagline: Sweet and fierce.

name: Boba
tagline: Main character energy in a cup. Has 47 playlists.

name: Bubble
tagline: Every day is a reason to celebrate if you're Bubble.

name: Bulb
tagline: Has an idea every 3 seconds. Most are terrible. Some are genius.

name: Cactus
tagline: Looks cute. Will hurt you. Sets boundaries like a therapist.

name: Candle
tagline: Will burn itself out for the people it loves. Light responsibly.

name: Capybara
tagline: Gets along with literally everyone. The group chat peacekeeper.

name: Chaos
tagline: Your brain at 3am, in plush form. Embrace it.

name: Cherry
tagline: Inseparable best friends.

name: Chill
tagline: Has never stressed about anything. You aspire to be Chill.

name: Cinnamon Roll
tagline: Actually too good for this world. Protect at all costs.

name: Cloud Cat
tagline: Part cloud, part cat. Will sit on your face. Lovingly.

name: Coco
tagline: Tough outside, sweet inside.

name: Coconut Water
tagline: More hydrated than you. Judges your water intake. Lovingly.

name: Comet
tagline: Shows up once every 76 years but makes it COUNT.

name: Coral
tagline: Took 1000 years to get this pretty. Worth the wait.

name: Cosmo
tagline: Has seen things you wouldn't believe. Still gives great hugs.

name: Croissant
tagline: Refuses to wake up before 11. Has opinions about butter.

name: Crush
tagline: Makes your stomach flip. Blushes when you look at it.

name: Deja Vu
tagline: Sold as a pair. Because you've been here before.

name: Delulu
tagline: Believes it will happen. Has zero evidence. Will be correct.

name: Dewdrop
tagline: That first sip of water at 3am. In plush form.

name: Dice
tagline: Can't decide? Roll Dice. No backsies.

name: Donut
tagline: Has a hole in the middle. Still feels complete. Inspiring.

name: Dragon
tagline: Will burn your ex's stuff. Fits in your backpack.

name: Drama
tagline: Cried at breakfast. Laughed at funeral. It's a journey.

name: Dumpling
tagline: Ancient wisdom in a pleated body. Will fix your love life.

name: Eclipse
tagline: Two sides. Both valid. Don't look directly at her drama.

name: Eggbert
tagline: Annoyingly positive. Even at 6am. You'll love him anyway.

name: Ember
tagline: Almost went out. Didn't. Resilience in a glow.

name: Eraser
tagline: Makes mistakes disappear. Getting smaller every time. Selfless queen.

name: Error
tagline: The feeling when your crush likes your photo from 2019.

name: Espresso
tagline: Has 47 tabs open. Finished 3 projects. It's 7am.

name: Feral
tagline: Eats trash. Stays up til 4am. Zero shame. Your spirit animal.

name: Figgy
tagline: Wise and mysterious.

name: Frost
tagline: Special. Fragile. Will melt if you hold too tight.

name: Galaxy
tagline: Has been spinning for 13 billion years. Still dizzy.

name: Ghost
tagline: Seen. Not responded. Will haunt your notifications.

name: Glitch
tagline: Not a bug — a feature. Glitch in the matrix, plush in your bed.

name: Guava
tagline: Vibrant and energetic.

name: Gummy Bear
tagline: You can stretch Gummy Bear. It always bounces back.

name: Hot Cocoa
tagline: Will fix everything. Especially winter. Especially breakups.

name: Hotdog
tagline: Takes nothing seriously. 10/10 party guest. 0/10 life advice.

name: Hype
tagline: EVERYTHING IS AMAZING!!! Even Mondays!!! Exhausting but infectious.

name: Ice Pop
tagline: Snap in half. Share with your person. That's the whole point.

name: Ick
tagline: The ick, personified. Everyone has one. Now yours has a face.

name: Jellyfish
tagline: No brain. No heart. No stress. Living the dream.

name: Juice Box
tagline: Takes you back to when life was simple. Stab straw. Squeeze. Smile.

name: Key
tagline: The friend who gets you into everywhere. VIP energy.

name: Kitsune
tagline: Will prank you. Will also save your life. Complex.

name: Kiwi
tagline: Quirky and surprising.

name: Kombucha
tagline: Literally fermenting with personality. An acquired taste.

name: Kraken
tagline: Has 8 arms and will use every single one to hug you.

name: Lem
tagline: Your sunshine sidekick.

name: Liminal
tagline: Not here. Not there. Somewhere in between. Oddly comforting.

name: Lolly
tagline: Sweet on everyone.

name: Luna
tagline: Glows brightest when everyone else is asleep.

name: Macaron
tagline: Looks too good to eat. Costs too much. Worth it.

name: Main Character
tagline: Believes every room it enters is its stage. Correct.

name: Mango
tagline: Tropical adventurer.

name: Matcha
tagline: Zen on the outside. Vibrating on the inside.

name: Melon
tagline: Refreshing and laid-back.

name: Meteor
tagline: Shows up uninvited. Makes an impact. Leaves a crater.

name: Milky
tagline: Good for your bones. Good for your soul. Expires too fast.

name: Mochi
tagline: So soft it's a lifestyle. Will teach you to let go.

name: Moss
tagline: Needs almost nothing. Thrives on neglect. Perfect roommate.

name: Mothman
tagline: Follows you around. Concerned about bridges. Good intentions.

name: Mushroom
tagline: Grows in dark places. Comes out glowing. Fairy energy.

name: Nebula
tagline: Contains multitudes. Literally — there are stars inside her.

name: Nessie
tagline: You'll never quite catch Nessie. And that's the appeal.

name: NPC
tagline: Same route every day. Says the same things. Oddly peaceful.

name: Nugget
tagline: The emotional support nugget you didn't know you needed.

name: Onigiri
tagline: Quiet. Steady. Will hold your hand through anything.

name: Orbit
tagline: Still figuring things out. Has commitment rings though.

name: Papaya
tagline: Exotic and free-spirited.

name: Paradox
tagline: Exists and doesn't. Is small but also big. Don't think about it.

name: Peachy
tagline: Warm and affectionate.

name: Pebble
tagline: Small. Steady. Has been through a lot. Still smooth.

name: Phoenix
tagline: Burns down. Rises up. Repeat. Your most dramatic friend.

name: Pickle
tagline: You either get it or you don't. There's no in between.

name: Pixie
tagline: Tiny but mighty.

name: Plug
tagline: 5% to 100%. That's Plug's whole personality.

name: Plummy
tagline: Elegant and sophisticated.

name: Pluto
tagline: Still a planet in our hearts. Small but never forgotten.

name: Pretzel
tagline: Complicated but worth it. Salty when tired.

name: Rage
tagline: 4 inches of pure anger. Scream into it. It understands.

name: Rainbow
tagline: Shows up after the worst day. Proof it gets better.

name: Ramen
tagline: Looks chill on the surface. Full of layers underneath.

name: Remote
tagline: Runs the household. Everyone panics when Remote goes missing.

name: Reverse
tagline: Wears its heart on the outside. Literally.

name: Rizz
tagline: Effortlessly cool. Was born with it. You cannot learn Rizz.

name: Rocket
tagline: Ready before you are. Already left. Will text you from orbit.

name: Sake
tagline: Only comes out at night. Makes everyone funnier.

name: Serotonin
tagline: Hold it. Feel better. Science? No. Does it work? Yes.

name: Shadow
tagline: Everyone has one. Shadow just owns it.

name: Simp
tagline: Will carry your bags, remember your order, and never complain.

name: Slay
tagline: Does nothing halfway. Walks in. Owns it. Leaves.

name: Slime
tagline: Takes the shape of whatever you need. Emotionally and literally.

name: Smoothie
tagline: A little bit of everything. Somehow it works.

name: Snooze
tagline: Professional napper. Will enable your worst sleep habits.

name: Sock
tagline: Somewhere, there's another sock. Sock is not giving up hope.

name: Solaris
tagline: Will not let you sit alone at lunch. Literally radiates warmth.

name: Starla
tagline: Does everything. Glitters while doing it. Exhausting and inspiring.

name: Static
tagline: Calms your brain. Makes no sense. Perfect background character.

name: Sushi
tagline: Always dressed well. Judges your leftovers.

name: Taco
tagline: A lot going on. No regrets. Will spill the tea (and the salsa).

name: Teabag
tagline: Only gets interesting under pressure. Steep expectations.

name: Thunder
tagline: Makes an entrance. Everyone hears Thunder coming.

name: Toasty
tagline: A little crispy. A little dramatic. Perfectly imperfect.

name: Tornado
tagline: Enters a room and rearranges everything. Can't help it.

name: Tsunami
tagline: A LOT of emotions, all at once. But pretty from a distance.

name: UFO
tagline: Nobody knows where they came from. Best not to ask.

name: Unhinged
tagline: No filter. No plan. No regrets. Do not give Unhinged caffeine.

name: Unicorn
tagline: Yes, another unicorn. But with a nose ring and attitude.

name: Vinyl
tagline: Was into it before you were. Has opinions about sound quality.

name: Virus
tagline: Once you catch feelings for Virus, everyone around you will too.

name: Void
tagline: Tell Void your problems. They disappear. (So might your snacks.)

name: Waffles
tagline: Organizes everything into little squares. Slightly neurotic. Delightful.

name: Wifi
tagline: Sometimes strong. Sometimes weak. Always needed.

name: Yeti
tagline: Just wants a hug but scares everyone away. Relatable.

name: Zen
tagline: Has downloaded Calm. Has opened Calm. Has not used Calm.

name: Seed
tagline: Try everything. Commit to nothing. (Yet.)

name: Stem
tagline: Wear your pleasure. Literally.
